customer_release: Still NO — flat raw model remains

name: Preserve demand-only calibrated prediction across exports
changes: predicted_units_total_promo = calibrated_predicted_units_total_promo; keep policy_adjusted_predicted_units_total_promo as separate order column

name: Route caps into order policy only
changes: Split allocation_cap_units from demand; remove policy cap ceiling on predicted_units_total_promo_raw; apply caps only in order reconciliation

name: Flat raw-model diagnostic gate
changes: Detect promotion-level modal raw share > threshold; emit demand_prediction_warning; block customer-ready release; remove integerize floor masking for demand contract input
risk: LOW for safety — prevents silent bad release

name: Feature consensus fallback (after actual-outcome validation only)
changes: Only after provenance validated: optional demand_repaired fallback when raw flat AND feature validated; never default
tests: Provenance-gated integration tests with historical actuals
risk: HIGH if premature — do not implement until Phase 1-4 stable
